entries.content: I'll start by thoroughly investigating the codebase and reading the spec. Let me do this in parallel.

entries.detail:
1→# bop ui — full interactive TUI (kanban-first)
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` (spec 025) does in-place ANSI redraw — no alternate
     6→screen. `bop ui` is the explicit opt-in full TUI: alternate screen, **kanban
     7→columns as primary layout**, keyboard navigation, live log tail, fuzzy filter,
     8→action menu. Think k9s for bop cards, with kanban-tui's column-first UX.
     9→
    10→**Prior art synthesized:**
    11→- **ratatui** (codex-rs, gitui, television): double-buffer diff rendering
    12→  built-in — full frame every tick, only changed cells emitted. Do not
    13→  implement a separate sprite-map diff.
    14→- **codex-rs AppEvent pattern**: crossterm + FSEvents notify + timer ticks
    15→  all become one `AppEvent` enum, processed by a single async event loop.
    16→- **codex-rs newline-gated streaming**: buffer log bytes, emit only on `\n`
    17→  to prevent partial ANSI sequence flicker in the live log tail.
    18→- **television / nucleo**: blazing-fast fuzzy filter for `/` mode.
    19→- **lazygit**: action popup via ratatui `Clear` + centered overlay; context-
    20→  sensitive footer keybindings per mode.
    21→- **htop**: provider meter bars in header; saturation coloring.
    22→- **btop**: sparkline `▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█` for throughput history.
    23→- **k9s**: three-zone law (header / body / footer); breadcrumb; `/` filter.
    24→- **kanban-tui / TUI-Kanban**: horizontal columns as primary view; `h/l`
    25→  between columns, `j/k` within; `Shift+H/L` move card to adjacent state;
    26→  WIP limit indicator on column headers.
    27→- **mc (Midnight Commander)**: `Ctrl+O` drops to subshell in card worktree,
    28→  returning to TUI on exit; F-key secondary legend in footer.
    29→- **yazi**: async task priority — render current column first, then prefetch
    30→  neighbours. Multi-select `Tab` accumulates marked cards.
    31→
    32→## Dependencies
    33→
    34→```toml
    35→[dependencies]
    36→ratatui   = "0.29"          # MIT — double-buffer diff, widget system
    37→crossterm = "0.28"          # MIT — alternate screen, events, mouse
    38→nucleo    = "0.5"           # MIT — helix's fuzzy matcher, <1ms on 10k items
    39→```
    40→
    41→## Layout
    42→
    43→```
    44→╔═ bop · 14:23:07 · claude ████░░ ok · codex ░░░░░░ 4m · ▁▂▃▅▇ 8/hr ══════╗
    45→╠═ · PENDING (3) ════╦═ ⚙ RUNNING (2/4) ═════╦═ ✓ DONE (8) ╦═ ✗ FAILED (1) ╣
    46→║  · docs-update     ║▶ my-feature  claude 2m ║ ✓ perf-impr ║ ✗ broken-card ║
    47→║  · refactor-api    ║  ████████░░ 67%  Ph 2  ║ ✓ network   ║               ║
    48→║  · add-tests       ║  bugfix-auth codex  43s║ ✓ cleanup   ║               ║
    49→║                    ║  ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph 1  ║             ║               ║
    50→║                    ║                        ║             ║               ║
    51→╠════════════════════╩════════════════════════╩═════════════╩═══════════════╣
    52→║ [h/l]col [j/k]card [↵]actions [Shift+H/L]move [/]filter [n]new [q]quit  ║
    53→╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
    54→```
    55→
    56→Three zones:
    57→- **Header** (2 rows): live clock + provider meter bars + sparkline
    58→- **Body** (terminal height - 4): horizontal kanban columns
    59→- **Footer** (1 row): context-sensitive keybindings
    60→
    61→## Implementation
    62→
    63→### Entry point
    64→
    65→`crates/bop-cli/src/ui.rs` — `pub async fn run_ui(cards_dir: PathBuf) -> anyhow::Result<()>`
    66→
    67→Called via `bop ui` subcommand. Enters alternate screen, installs raw mode,
    68→exits cleanly on `q` or Ctrl-C. RAII cleanup via a `TerminalGuard` struct that
    69→calls `crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode` + `LeaveAlternateScreen` on drop.
    70→
    71→### AppEvent
    72→
    73→```rust
    74→enum AppEvent {
    75→    Key(KeyEvent),
    76→    Resize(u16, u16),
    77→    Tick,                          // 250ms timer
    78→    Cards(Vec<CardView>),          // notify watcher sent new card list
    79→    LogLine(String),               // new line from log tail reader
    80→}
    81→```
    82→
    83→Background tasks send to `tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<AppEvent>()`.
    84→UI loop: `tokio::select!` on the channel + crossterm event reader. Never block
    85→the render thread.
    86→
    87→### App state
    88→
    89→```rust
    90→struct App {
    91→    columns: Vec<KanbanColumn>,    // ordered: pending, running, done, failed, merged
    92→    col_focus: usize,              // index into columns
    93→    filter: Option<String>,        // active nucleo query
    94→    mode: Mode,
    95→    log_buf: VecDeque<String>,     // last 200 lines from selected card's logs
    96→    throughput: VecDeque<u8>,      // 8 samples for sparkline
    97→}
    98→
    99→struct KanbanColumn {
   100→    state: CardState,              // pending | running | done | failed | merged
   101→    cards: Vec<CardView>,
   102→    list_state: ListState,
   103→    wip_limit: Option<usize>,      // from providers.json max_concurrent for running
   104→    collapsed: bool,               // true when card count == 0
   105→}
   106→
   107→enum Mode {
   108→    Normal,
   109→    Filter,       // / active
   110→    ActionPopup,  // ↵ menu open
   111→    Detail,       // card detail overlay
   112→    LogTail,      // full-height log tail overlay
   113→    NewCard,      // n inline creation prompt
   114→    Subshell,     // Ctrl+O — TUI suspended, shell active
   115→}
   116→```
   117→
   118→### Column layout
   119→
   120→`Layout::horizontal` divides body width equally among non-collapsed columns.
   121→Collapsed columns (0 cards) render as a 3-char narrow divider showing only the
   122→state glyph (`·`, `⚙`, `✓`, `✗`, `~`). Collapsed state toggled automatically
   123→as card counts change.
   124→
   125→Each column is a ratatui `List` of card rows inside a `Block` with title:
   126→- Normal: `╔═ · PENDING (3) ════╗` (dim border)
   127→- Focused: amber (`Color::Yellow`) border
   128→- Running column with WIP limit: `⚙ RUNNING (2/4)` — turns amber at ≥75%,
   129→  red at 100% (column header + border, atop saturation coloring)
   130→
   131→Card row in column (two lines for running cards, one for others):
   132→```
   133→▶ my-feature    claude    2m 14s
   134→  ████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑
   135→```
   136→Running cards show progress; pending/done/failed show one line.
   137→
   138→### Navigation
   139→
   140→| Key | Action |
   141→|---|---|
   142→| `h` / `l` | Move focus to previous / next column |
   143→| `j` / `k` | Select card up / down within column |
   144→| `H` / `L` (Shift) | Move selected card to adjacent state (left/right) |
   145→| `↵` | Open action popup |
   146→| `d` | Open detail overlay for selected card |
   147→| `F3` / `L` | Open log tail overlay |
   148→| `/` | Activate filter mode |
   149→| `n` | New card inline prompt |
   150→| `!` | Subshell in card worktree (vim `:!` convention; `Ctrl+O` is taken by Zellij) |
   151→| `Tab` | Multi-select: toggle mark on current card |
   152→| `q` / `Ctrl+C` | Quit |
   153→
   154→**Shift+H/L card movement**: calls `fs::rename` directly to move card directory
   155→between state dirs (pending ↔ running not allowed from TUI — only done/failed
   156→↔ pending are safe manual moves). Fires a `Cards` event to refresh immediately.
   157→
   158→### Detail overlay (lazygit pattern)
   159→
   160→Press `d` on selected card → detail panel overlaid on right 50% of body:
   161→
   162→```
   163→╭─ my-feature ─────────────────────╮
   164→│ claude · 2m 14s   ████████░░ 67% │
   165→│                                   │
   166→│ Phase 1  Crash Safety  ●●●●●  5/5 │
   167→│ Phase 2  Network       ●○○○   1/4 │
   168→│   ◉ Write result.md  in_progress  │
   169→│   ○ Run make check   pending      │
   170→│                                   │
   171→│ [F3]logs [p]pause [r]retry [Esc]  │
   172→╰───────────────────────────────────╯
   173→```
   174→
   175→Uses ratatui `Clear` widget on a centered `Rect` + bordered `Block`. Renders
   176→`CardView` + AC plan progress (spec 027) phase/subtask tree. Scrollable with
   177→`j/k`.
   178→
   179→### Action popup (lazygit pattern)
   180→
   181→Press `↵` on selected card:
   182→
   183→```
   184→╭─ Actions: my-feature ──────────────╮
   185→│ [F3] View logs                     │
   186→│ [z]  Open Zellij pane              │
   187→│ [p]  Pause adapter                 │
   188→│ [r]  Retry                         │
   189→│ [k]  Kill (SIGTERM)                │
   190→│ [i]  Inspect AC plan               │
   191→│ [Esc] Cancel                       │
   192→╰────────────────────────────────────╯
   193→```
   194→
   195→Available actions filtered by card state (can't pause a done card, can't retry
   196→a running card).
   197→
   198→### Log tail overlay
   199→
   200→Full-height overlay replacing the body. Triggered by `F3` or `L`:
   201→
   202→```
   203→╔═ logs: my-feature ════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
   204→║ > subtask-1-5: bop recover done                                   ║
   205→║ > Running cargo test -p bop-core                                  ║
   206→║ > test result: ok. 447 passed; 0 failed                           ║
   207→╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
   208→║ [↑↓]scroll [f]follow [c]clear [Esc]close                         ║
   209→╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
   210→```
   211→
   212→**Newline-gated streaming** (codex-rs pattern):
   213→- Open `logs/stdout` and `logs/stderr` of selected card with `O_NONBLOCK`
   214→- Read bytes into a line buffer; only emit complete lines (ending in `\n`)
   215→- Never render a partial line — prevents flickering mid-ANSI-sequence
   216→- On card selection change: close old handles, open new ones, seek to EOF
   217→- Last 200 lines in `VecDeque<String>`. `f` toggles follow-mode (auto-scroll).
   218→
   219→### Filter mode (k9s pattern)
   220→
   221→`/` activates filter:
   222→- Footer replaced with: `Filter: my-feat█  [Esc]clear  [↵]confirm`

[workspace]
resolver = "2"
members = [
  "crates/bop-core",
  "crates/bop-cli",
]
# bop-zellij-plugin is a WASM-only cdylib and must be built separately:
#   cargo build -p bop-zellij-plugin --target wasm32-wasip1 --release
# It cannot be compiled for the host target (cdylib + WASM-only deps).

[workspace.package]
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT"

[workspace.dependencies]
anyhow = "1"
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
clap_complete = "4"
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
thiserror = "2"
walkdir = "2"
url = "2"

dirs = "5.0"

[profile.release]
opt-level = 3
lto = "thin"

1→[package]
     2→name = "bop"
     3→version = "0.1.0"
     4→edition.workspace = true
     5→license.workspace = true
     6→
     7→[dependencies]
     8→anyhow.workspace = true
     9→chrono.workspace = true
    10→clap.workspace = true
    11→clap_complete.workspace = true
    12→serde_json.workspace = true
    13→walkdir.workspace = true
    14→url.workspace = true
    15→bop-core = { path = "../bop-core" }
    16→tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "time", "process", "signal"] }
    17→axum = "0.7"
    18→serde.workspace = true
    19→notify = "6"
    20→notify-debouncer-mini = "0.4"
    21→subtle = "2"
    22→tower = { version = "0.4", features = ["util"] }
    23→tower_governor = "0.4"
    24→rand = "0.8"
    25→core-foundation = "0.9"
    26→terminal_size = "0.4"
    27→
    28→[dev-dependencies]
    29→tempfile = "3"
    30→chrono.workspace = true
    31→serde_json.workspace = true
    32→bop-core = { path = "../bop-core" }
    33→

1→[package]
     2→name = "bop-core"
     3→version = "0.1.0"
     4→edition.workspace = true
     5→license.workspace = true
     6→
     7→[dependencies]
     8→anyhow.workspace = true
     9→blake3 = "1"
    10→chrono.workspace = true
    11→dirs.workspace = true
    12→serde.workspace = true
    13→serde_json.workspace = true
    14→tempfile = "3"
    15→thiserror.workspace = true
    16→
    17→[dev-dependencies]
    18→tempfile = "3"
    19→

1→use anyhow::Context;
     2→use bop_core::VcsEngine as CoreVcsEngine;
     3→use clap::{Parser, Subcommand, ValueEnum};
     4→use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
     5→use std::fs;
     6→use std::path::PathBuf;
     7→
     8→mod cards;
     9→mod colors;
    10→mod dispatcher;
    11→mod doctor;
    12→mod events;
    13→mod factory;
    14→mod gantt;
    15→mod icons;
    16→mod index;
    17→mod inspect;
    18→mod list;
    19→mod lock;
    20→mod logs;
    21→mod memory;
    22→mod merge_gate;
    23→mod paths;
    24→mod poker;
    25→mod policy;
    26→mod power;
    27→mod providers;
    28→mod quicklook;
    29→mod reaper;
    30→mod render;
    31→mod serve;
    32→mod termcaps;
    33→mod util;
    34→mod workspace;
    35→
    36→#[derive(Parser, Debug)]
    37→#[command(name = "bop")]
    38→struct Cli {
    39→    #[arg(long, default_value = ".cards")]
    40→    cards_dir: String,
    41→
    42→    #[command(subcommand)]
    43→    cmd: Command,
    44→}
    45→
    46→#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]
    47→enum Command {
    48→    Init,
    49→    New {
    50→        template: String,
    51→        id: String,
    52→        /// Team for glyph suit assignment (cli, arch, quality, platform).
    53→        /// Auto-detected from card directory if omitted.
    54→        #[arg(long)]
    55→        team: Option<String>,
    56→    },
    57→    Status {
    58→        #[arg(default_value = "")]
    59→        id: String,
    60→        /// Watch for changes and update status automatically.
    61→        #[arg(short, long)]
    62→        watch: bool,
    63→    },
    64→    Validate {
    65→        id: String,
    66→        /// Run realtime feed validation on the job's output records.
    67→        #[arg(long)]
    68→        realtime: bool,
    69→    },
    70→    Dispatcher {
    71→        #[arg(short = 'a', long, default_value = "adapters/mock.nu")]
    72→        adapter: String,
    73→
    74→        #[arg(short = 'w', long)]
    75→        max_workers: Option<usize>,
    76→
    77→        #[arg(long, default_value_t = 500)]
    78→        poll_ms: u64,
    79→
    80→        #[arg(long)]
    81→        max_retries: Option<u32>,
    82→
    83→        #[arg(long, default_value_t = 1000)]
    84→        reap_ms: u64,
    85→
    86→        #[arg(long)]
    87→        no_reap: bool,
    88→
    89→        #[arg(short = '1', long)]
    90→        once: bool,
    91→
    92→        /// Error-rate threshold (0.0–1.0) above which a job with critical alerts
    93→        /// is moved to failed/ instead of done/. Default 1.0 means never fail.
    94→        #[arg(long, default_value_t = 1.0)]
    95→        validation_fail_threshold: f64,
    96→
    97→        /// VCS engine used for workspace preparation and publish.
    98→        #[arg(short = 'v', long, value_enum, default_value_t = VcsEngine::GitGt)]
    99→        vcs_engine: VcsEngine,
   100→    },
   101→    MergeGate {
   102→        #[arg(long, default_value_t = 500)]
   103→        poll_ms: u64,
   104→
   105→        #[arg(short = '1', long)]
   106→        once: bool,
   107→
   108→        /// VCS engine used for finalize/publish flow.
   109→        #[arg(short = 'v', long, value_enum, default_value_t = VcsEngine::GitGt)]
   110→        vcs_engine: VcsEngine,
   111→    },
   112→    /// Move a card back to pending/ so the dispatcher picks it up again.
   113→    Retry {
   114→        id: String,
   115→    },
   116→    /// Retry cards that failed with transient errors (rate limits, timeouts).
   117→    RetryTransient {
   118→        /// Card ID to retry (if omitted with --all, retries all transient failures).
   119→        id: Option<String>,
   120→        /// Retry all cards with transient failures.
   121→        #[arg(long)]
   122→        all: bool,
   123→    },
   124→    /// Pause a running card, preventing it from being dispatched until resumed.
   125→    Pause {
   126→        id: String,
   127→    },
   128→    /// Resume a paused card, allowing it to be dispatched again.
   129→    Resume {
   130→        id: String,
   131→    },
   132→    /// Send SIGTERM to the running agent and mark the card as failed.
   133→    Kill {
   134→        id: String,
   135→    },
   136→    /// Approve a card that has decision_required set, unblocking it for dispatch.
   137→    Approve {
   138→        id: String,
   139→    },
   140→    /// Stream stdout and stderr logs for a card.
   141→    Logs {
   142→        id: String,
   143→        /// Keep streaming as new output arrives (like tail -f).
   144→        #[arg(short, long)]
   145→        follow: bool,
   146→    },
   147→    /// Show meta, spec, and a log summary for a card.
   148→    Inspect {
   149→        id: String,
   150→    },
   151→    /// List cards with glyphs, stages, and progress.
   152→    List {
   153→        /// Filter: pending, running, done, failed, merged, active (default), all.
   154→        #[arg(long, default_value = "active")]
   155→        state: String,
   156→        /// Emit newline-delimited JSON (ndjson) instead of ANSI table.
   157→        /// One JSON object per line: Meta fields + "state" + "team".
   158→        /// Pipe to: jq, nu, fzf, rg for filtering and selection.
   159→        #[arg(long)]
   160→        json: bool,
   161→    },
   162→    /// Safely mutate selected meta fields with schema validation.
   163→    Meta {
   164→        #[command(subcommand)]
   165→        action: MetaAction,
   166→    },
   167→    /// Run policy gates.
   168→    Policy {
   169→        #[command(subcommand)]
   170→        action: PolicyAction,
   171→    },
   172→    /// Check local toolchain/environment prerequisites.
   173→    Doctor {
   174→        /// Skip time-consuming checks (e.g. make check).
   175→        #[arg(long)]
   176→        fast: bool,
   177→    },
   178→    /// Generate shell completion script.
   179→    Completions {
   180→        #[arg(value_enum)]
   181→        shell: clap_complete::Shell,
   182→    },
   183→    /// Async planning-poker estimation using playing-card glyphs.
   184→    Poker {
   185→        #[command(subcommand)]
   186→        action: PokerAction,
   187→    },
   188→    /// Manage launchd services for dispatcher and merge-gate.
   189→    Factory {
   190→        #[command(subcommand)]
   191→        action: FactoryAction,
   192→    },
   193→    /// Keep Finder folder icons in sync with card state.
   194→    Icons {
   195→        #[command(subcommand)]
   196→        action: IconsAction,
   197→    },
   198→    /// Promote cards from drafts/ to pending/, making them eligible for dispatch.
   199→    Promote {
   200→        /// Card ID, or "all" to promote every draft.
   201→        id: String,
   202→    },
   203→    /// Import cards from a JSON file into drafts/ (or pending/ with --immediate).
   204→    Import {
   205→        /// Path to JSON file with card definitions (a JSON array of card objects).
   206→        source: String,
   207→        /// Import directly to pending/ instead of drafts/.
   208→        #[arg(long)]
   209→        immediate: bool,
   210→    },
   211→    /// Generate a concise codebase map at .cards/CODEBASE.md for agent orientation.
   212→    Index {
   213→        /// Print to stdout instead of writing the file.
   214→        #[arg(long)]
   215→        print: bool,
   216→    },
   217→    /// Quick-create an ideation card from a topic string.
   218→    #[command(alias = "brainstorm", alias = "ideation")]
   219→    Bstorm {
   220→        /// Topic words (joined into the spec & slugified into the card ID).
   221→        topic: Vec<String>,
   222→        /// Team for glyph suit assignment (cli, arch, quality, platform).
   223→        #[arg(long)]
   224→        team: Option<String>,
   225→    },
   226→    /// Show a Gantt timeline of card runs (ANSI by default, --html for browser).
   227→    Gantt {
   228→        /// Output HTML file instead of ANSI terminal chart.
   229→        #[arg(long)]
   230→        html: bool,
   231→        /// Open the HTML file in the default browser (implies --html).
   232→        #[arg(long, short = 'o')]
   233→        open: bool,
   234→        /// Override terminal width (auto-detected from pane/terminal).
   235→        #[arg(long, short = 'w')]
   236→        width: Option<usize>,
   237→    },
   238→    /// Show OpenLineage events from .cards/events.jsonl.
   239→    Events {
   240→        /// Filter events by card ID.
   241→        #[arg(long)]
   242→        card: Option<String>,
   243→        /// Output raw JSONL instead of formatted table.
   244→        #[arg(long)]
   245→        json: bool,
   246→        /// Number of recent events to show.
   247→        #[arg(long, default_value = "20")]
   248→        limit: usize,
   249→        /// Health check: verify events.jsonl integrity and print summary.
   250→        #[arg(long)]
   251→        check: bool,
   252→    },
   253→    /// Clean up old cards from done/ and failed/ directories.
   254→    Clean {
   255→        /// Show what would be deleted without actually deleting.
   256→        #[arg(long)]
   257→        dry_run: bool,
   258→        /// Only delete cards older than N days.
   259→        #[arg(long)]
   260→        older_than: Option<u64>,
   261→        /// Target state directory (done, failed, or both).
   262→        #[arg(long)]
   263→        state: Option<String>,
   264→    },
   265→    /// Start an HTTP server that accepts card creation requests via POST /cards/new.
   266→    Serve {
   267→        /// Host to bind (default: 127.0.0.1).
   268→        #[arg(long, default_value = "127.0.0.1")]
   269→        host: String,
   270→        /// Port to listen on (default: 8080).

1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Skills
     6→
     7→Four skills provide orientation for this repo — invoke before working:
     8→- `bop-system` — what `bop` is, card lifecycle, state machine
     9→- `vibekanban` — Quick Look cards, Zellij plugin, glyph system, SwiftUI card anatomy
    10→- `unicode-glyphs` — playing card encoding, BMP/SMP safety, font recommendations
    11→- `bop-team` — dogfood rule: every unit of work on bop = a bop card
    12→
    13→## System context for dispatched agents
    14→
    15→`.cards/system_context.md` is auto-prepended to every agent prompt by
    16→`PromptContext::from_files`. Edit it to orient agents without touching templates.
    17→
    18→## Commands
    19→
    20→```sh
    21→cargo build                  # Build all crates
    22→cargo test                   # Run all tests
    23→cargo test -p bop-core       # Run tests for a single crate
    24→cargo clippy -- -D warnings  # Lint (warnings treated as errors)
    25→cargo fmt                    # Format code
    26→cargo fmt --check            # Check formatting without changes
    27→make check                   # Run test + lint + fmt check together
    28→
    29→# Canonical CLI: bop
    30→RUST_LOG=debug ./target/debug/bop dispatcher --once  # Debug dispatcher
    31→bop gantt                    # ANSI Gantt timeline in terminal (auto-fits pane)
    32→bop gantt --html             # HTML Gantt to .cards/bop-gantt.html
    33→bop gantt -o                 # HTML + open in browser
    34→bop gantt -w 80              # Force 80-column width
    35→
    36→# JJ-first collaboration (recommended with multiple live agents)
    37→jj status
    38→jj workspace list
    39→jj log -r '::@'
    40→```
    41→
    42→## Architecture
    43→
    44→This is a **Rust Cargo workspace** with two active crates:
    45→
    46→- **`crates/bop-core`** — shared library: `Meta` struct (card state), `read_meta`/`write_meta`, `render_prompt` (template substitution with `{{spec}}`, `{{plan}}`, etc.), and the `realtime` module (feed validation types + tests).
    47→- **`crates/bop-cli`** — CLI binary (`bop` command). Dispatcher and merge-gate support `--vcs-engine git_gt|jj`; prefer `jj` for active multi-agent sessions.
    48→
    49→### Multi-Agent VCS Rule (JJ First)
    50→
    51→When multiple agents are active, use JJ as the collaboration layer and treat Git as publish/transport:
    52→
    53→1. Every agent works in an isolated workspace (`jj workspace add ...`), never directly on shared `main`.
    54→2. Keep one integrator workspace that is the only place allowed to land to `main`.
    55→3. Land only after gates pass in the integrator workspace:
    56→   - `make check`
    57→   - `./target/debug/bop policy check --staged`
    58→4. Publish to Git only from green JJ changes (`jj git push --all`).
    59→5. If a change is partially renamed or mid-refactor, do not land it; queue it behind a decision card.
    60→
    61→### Storage — HARD RULES (do not re-litigate)
    62→
    63→**NO SQLite. NO Dolt. NO additional JSON files. NO new databases of any kind.**
    64→
    65→The storage model is: filesystem as state machine + JSONL append-only event log per card.
    66→This decision is final. Do not propose alternatives. Do not sneak in new dependencies
    67→(rusqlite, sqlx, dolt, sled, redb, etc.). If you think you need a database, you are wrong —
    68→reach for `logs/events.jsonl` (append-only) or `meta.json` (guarded by checksum + readonly perms).
    69→
    70→Rationale (also in `docs/storage-decision.md`):
    71→- `fs::rename` is atomic — that IS the transaction
    72→- COW clone (`cp -c`) works on directory bundles, not database rows
    73→- JSONL O_APPEND is atomic for writes < 4096 bytes — no locking needed
    74→- sha256 checksum in `meta.json` detects corruption; JSONL replay recovers it
    75→- Zero external runtime dependencies
    76→
    77→### Card State Machine
    78→
    79→The filesystem is the state machine. `.cards/` subdirectories represent states; state transitions are atomic `fs::rename` calls:
    80→
    81→```
    82→pending/ → running/ → done/ → merged/
    83→                    ↓
    84→                 failed/
    85→```
    86→
    87→Each card is a `<id>.card/` directory bundle containing `meta.json`, `spec.md`, `prompt.md`, `logs/`, `output/`, and optionally `worktree/`.
    88→
    89→### Key Data Flows
    90→
    91→1. **`bop new <template> <id>`** — COW-clones a template from `.cards/templates/` into `.cards/pending/` using APFS `cp -c` (macOS) or `--reflink=auto` (Linux), then writes `meta.json`.
    92→
    93→2. **Dispatcher loop** — polls `pending/`, moves cards to `running/`, selects a provider from `.cards/providers.json` (respecting cooldowns), spawns the adapter Nushell script, writes PID to `logs/pid` and as xattr `sh.bop.agent-pid`, then moves the card to `done/` (exit 0), back to `pending/` (exit 75 = rate-limited), or `failed/`.
    94→
    95→3. **Provider failover** — each `Meta` has a `provider_chain: Vec<String>`. On rate-limit (exit 75), the chain rotates (front→back) and a 300s cooldown is set on that provider in `providers.json`. For QA stage, the dispatcher avoids reusing the same provider that ran `implement`.
    96→
    97→4. **Merge gate loop** — polls `done/`, runs each `acceptance_criteria` entry as a shell command, then merges using the selected engine (`git_gt` or `jj`) into `main` inside the card's workspace/worktree. Failures go to `failed/` with a reason in `meta.json`.
    98→
    99→5. **Orphan reaping** — the dispatcher periodically checks `running/` for cards whose PID (from xattr or `logs/pid`) is no longer alive, returning them to `pending/` or moving to `failed/` after `max_retries`.
   100→
   101→### Adapters
   102→
   103→**Nushell scripts** in `adapters/` with the calling convention:
   104→```
   105→adapter.nu <workdir> <prompt_file> <stdout_log> <stderr_log> [timeout]
   106→```
   107→Exit code 75 signals rate-limiting (EX_TEMPFAIL). `mock.nu` is the default for testing.
   108→
   109→### `realtime` Module
   110→
   111→`bop_core::realtime` is a standalone sub-module providing types for feed validation (`FeedConfig`, `FeedRecord`, `FeedMetrics`, `validate_record`, `check_alerts`). It has comprehensive unit tests but is not wired into the dispatcher or CLI yet.
   112→

    24→/// Configuration for the .cards/ directory, stored in .cards/config.json
    25→/// All fields are Option so partial configs can be merged.
    26→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, Default, PartialEq)]
    27→pub struct CardsConfig {
    28→    /// Zellij session name for live attach (e.g. "bop" or "pmr").
    29→    /// Set by `bop init` when run inside a Zellij session.
    30→    #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    31→    pub zellij_session: Option<String>,
    32→}
    33→
    34→/// Parse JSON bytes into CardsConfig, returning a clear error on bad schema.
    35→pub fn parse_cards_config(json: &str) -> anyhow::Result<CardsConfig> {
    36→    if json.trim().is_empty() {
    37→        return Ok(CardsConfig::default());
    38→    }
    39→    serde_json::from_str(json).context(
    40→        "malformed .cards/config.json: expected schema with optional fields: \
    41→        zellij_session",
    42→    )
    43→}
    44→
    45→/// Return the cards config path: <cwd>/.cards/config.json
    46→pub fn cards_config_path() -> PathBuf {
    47→    std::env::current_dir()
    48→        .unwrap_or_else(|_| PathBuf::from("."))
    49→        .join(".cards")
    50→        .join("config.json")
    51→}
    52→
    53→/// Read config from .cards/config.json (used by `bop init`).
    54→pub fn read_cards_config_file(path: &Path) -> anyhow::Result<CardsConfig> {
    55→    let json = std::fs::read_to_string(path)
    56→        .with_context(|| format!("cannot read .cards config: {}", path.display()))?;
    57→    parse_cards_config(&json)
    58→        .with_context(|| format!("invalid .cards config at {}", path.display()))
    59→}
    60→
    61→/// Write config to .cards/config.json (used by `bop init`).
    62→pub fn write_cards_config_file(path: &Path, cfg: &CardsConfig) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
    63→    if let Some(parent) = path.parent() {
    64→        std::fs::create_dir_all(parent)
    65→            .with_context(|| format!("cannot create .cards config dir: {}", parent.display()))?;
    66→    }
    67→    let json = serde_json::to_string_pretty(cfg).context("failed to serialize .cards config")?;
    68→    std::fs::write(path, json)
    69→        .with_context(|| format!("cannot write .cards config: {}", path.display()))?;
    70→    Ok(())
    71→}

   410→impl Meta {
   411→    pub fn validate(&self) -> Result<(), BopError> {
   412→        if self.id.trim().is_empty() {
   413→            return Err(BopError::Invalid("meta.id is empty".to_string()));
   414→        }
   415→        if self.stage.trim().is_empty() {
   416→            return Err(BopError::Invalid("meta.stage is empty".to_string()));
   417→        }
   418→        if let Some(mode) = self.workflow_mode.as_ref() {
   419→            if mode.trim().is_empty() {
   420→                return Err(BopError::Invalid("meta.workflow_mode is empty".to_string()));
   421→            }
   422→        }
   423→        if self.step_index == Some(0) {
   424→            return Err(BopError::Invalid(
   425→                "meta.step_index must be >= 1".to_string(),
   426→            ));
   427→        }
   428→        if self.step_index.is_some() && self.workflow_mode.is_none() {
   429→            return Err(BopError::Invalid(
   430→                "meta.step_index requires meta.workflow_mode".to_string(),
   431→            ));
   432→        }
   433→        Ok(())
   434→    }
   435→}

1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests
    86→
    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---
    88→[x] perf-improvements   4m02s
    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)
    97→
    98→```
    99→+-- RUNNING (2) ------------------------------------------+
   100→| [>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  [========  ] 67%     |
   101→| [>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  [===       ] 22%     |
   102→+---------------------------------------------------------+
   103→```
   104→
   105→---
   106→
   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:
   110→
   111→```
   112→┌─ ⚙ RUNNING ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
   113→│▌ my-feature          claude      2m 14s               │
   114→│  ████████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑           │
   115→│                                                        │
   116→│▌ bugfix-auth         codex       0m 43s               │
   117→│  ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%   Phase 1: Core  ◔                │
   118→└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   119→
   120→┌─ · PENDING ───────┐  ┌─ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ───────────┐
   121→│  · docs-update    │  │  ✓ perf-improvements  4m 02s   │
   122→│  · refactor-api   │  │  ✗ broken-card  exit 1         │
   123→│  · add-tests      │  └────────────────────────────────┘
   124→└───────────────────┘
   125→```
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   135→
   136→▌ ⚀ my-feature          claude      2m 14s
   137→▌   ████████████░░░░ 67%    Phase 2: Network layer   ◑
   138→
   139→▌ ⚁ bugfix-auth          codex       0m 43s
   140→▌   ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%    Phase 1: Core impl         ◔
   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→

   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)

   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.

1→# bop ui — full interactive TUI (kanban-first)
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` (spec 025) does in-place ANSI redraw — no alternate
     6→screen. `bop ui` is the explicit opt-in full TUI: alternate screen, **kanban
     7→columns as primary layout**, keyboard navigation, live log tail, fuzzy filter,
     8→action menu. Think k9s for bop cards, with kanban-tui's column-first UX.
     9→
    10→**Prior art synthesized:**
    11→- **ratatui** (codex-rs, gitui, television): double-buffer diff rendering
    12→  built-in — full frame every tick, only changed cells emitted. Do not
    13→  implement a separate sprite-map diff.
    14→- **codex-rs AppEvent pattern**: crossterm + FSEvents notify + timer ticks
    15→  all become one `AppEvent` enum, processed by a single async event loop.
    16→- **codex-rs newline-gated streaming**: buffer log bytes, emit only on `\n`
    17→  to prevent partial ANSI sequence flicker in the live log tail.
    18→- **television / nucleo**: blazing-fast fuzzy filter for `/` mode.
    19→- **lazygit**: action popup via ratatui `Clear` + centered overlay; context-
    20→  sensitive footer keybindings per mode.
    21→- **htop**: provider meter bars in header; saturation coloring.
    22→- **btop**: sparkline `▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█` for throughput history.
    23→- **k9s**: three-zone law (header / body / footer); breadcrumb; `/` filter.
    24→- **kanban-tui / TUI-Kanban**: horizontal columns as primary view; `h/l`
    25→  between columns, `j/k` within; `Shift+H/L` move card to adjacent state;
    26→  WIP limit indicator on column headers.
    27→- **mc (Midnight Commander)**: `Ctrl+O` drops to subshell in card worktree,
    28→  returning to TUI on exit; F-key secondary legend in footer.
    29→- **yazi**: async task priority — render current column first, then prefetch
    30→  neighbours. Multi-select `Tab` accumulates marked cards.
    31→
    32→## Dependencies
    33→
    34→```toml
    35→[dependencies]
    36→ratatui   = "0.29"          # MIT — double-buffer diff, widget system
    37→crossterm = "0.28"          # MIT — alternate screen, events, mouse
    38→nucleo    = "0.5"           # MIT — helix's fuzzy matcher, <1ms on 10k items
    39→```
    40→
    41→## Layout
    42→
    43→```
    44→╔═ bop · 14:23:07 · claude ████░░ ok · codex ░░░░░░ 4m · ▁▂▃▅▇ 8/hr ══════╗
    45→╠═ · PENDING (3) ════╦═ ⚙ RUNNING (2/4) ═════╦═ ✓ DONE (8) ╦═ ✗ FAILED (1) ╣
    46→║  · docs-update     ║▶ my-feature  claude 2m ║ ✓ perf-impr ║ ✗ broken-card ║
    47→║  · refactor-api    ║  ████████░░ 67%  Ph 2  ║ ✓ network   ║               ║
    48→║  · add-tests       ║  bugfix-auth codex  43s║ ✓ cleanup   ║               ║
    49→║                    ║  ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph 1  ║             ║               ║
    50→║                    ║                        ║             ║               ║
    51→╠════════════════════╩════════════════════════╩═════════════╩═══════════════╣
    52→║ [h/l]col [j/k]card [↵]actions [Shift+H/L]move [/]filter [n]new [q]quit  ║
    53→╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
    54→```
    55→
    56→Three zones:
    57→- **Header** (2 rows): live clock + provider meter bars + sparkline
    58→- **Body** (terminal height - 4): horizontal kanban columns
    59→- **Footer** (1 row): context-sensitive keybindings
    60→
    61→## Implementation
    62→
    63→### Entry point
    64→
    65→`crates/bop-cli/src/ui.rs` — `pub async fn run_ui(cards_dir: PathBuf) -> anyhow::Result<()>`
    66→
    67→Called via `bop ui` subcommand. Enters alternate screen, installs raw mode,
    68→exits cleanly on `q` or Ctrl-C. RAII cleanup via a `TerminalGuard` struct that
    69→calls `crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode` + `LeaveAlternateScreen` on drop.
    70→
    71→### AppEvent
    72→
    73→```rust
    74→enum AppEvent {
    75→    Key(KeyEvent),
    76→    Resize(u16, u16),
    77→    Tick,                          // 250ms timer
    78→    Cards(Vec<CardView>),          // notify watcher sent new card list
    79→    LogLine(String),               // new line from log tail reader
    80→}
    81→```
    82→
    83→Background tasks send to `tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<AppEvent>()`.
    84→UI loop: `tokio::select!` on the channel + crossterm event reader. Never block
    85→the render thread.
    86→
    87→### App state
    88→
    89→```rust
    90→struct App {
    91→    columns: Vec<KanbanColumn>,    // ordered: pending, running, done, failed, merged
    92→    col_focus: usize,              // index into columns
    93→    filter: Option<String>,        // active nucleo query
    94→    mode: Mode,
    95→    log_buf: VecDeque<String>,     // last 200 lines from selected card's logs
    96→    throughput: VecDeque<u8>,      // 8 samples for sparkline
    97→}
    98→
    99→struct KanbanColumn {
   100→    state: CardState,              // pending | running | done | failed | merged
   101→    cards: Vec<CardView>,
   102→    list_state: ListState,
   103→    wip_limit: Option<usize>,      // from providers.json max_concurrent for running
   104→    collapsed: bool,               // true when card count == 0
   105→}
   106→
   107→enum Mode {
   108→    Normal,
   109→    Filter,       // / active
   110→    ActionPopup,  // ↵ menu open
   111→    Detail,       // card detail overlay
   112→    LogTail,      // full-height log tail overlay
   113→    NewCard,      // n inline creation prompt
   114→    Subshell,     // Ctrl+O — TUI suspended, shell active
   115→}
   116→```
   117→
   118→### Column layout
   119→
   120→`Layout::horizontal` divides body width equally among non-collapsed columns.
   121→Collapsed columns (0 cards) render as a 3-char narrow divider showing only the
   122→state glyph (`·`, `⚙`, `✓`, `✗`, `~`). Collapsed state toggled automatically
   123→as card counts change.
   124→
   125→Each column is a ratatui `List` of card rows inside a `Block` with title:
   126→- Normal: `╔═ · PENDING (3) ════╗` (dim border)
   127→- Focused: amber (`Color::Yellow`) border
   128→- Running column with WIP limit: `⚙ RUNNING (2/4)` — turns amber at ≥75%,
   129→  red at 100% (column header + border, atop saturation coloring)
   130→
   131→Card row in column (two lines for running cards, one for others):
   132→```
   133→▶ my-feature    claude    2m 14s
   134→  ████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑
   135→```
   136→Running cards show progress; pending/done/failed show one line.
   137→
   138→### Navigation
   139→
   140→| Key | Action |
   141→|---|---|
   142→| `h` / `l` | Move focus to previous / next column |
   143→| `j` / `k` | Select card up / down within column |
   144→| `H` / `L` (Shift) | Move selected card to adjacent state (left/right) |
   145→| `↵` | Open action popup |
   146→| `d` | Open detail overlay for selected card |
   147→| `F3` / `L` | Open log tail overlay |
   148→| `/` | Activate filter mode |
   149→| `n` | New card inline prompt |
   150→| `!` | Subshell in card worktree (vim `:!` convention; `Ctrl+O` is taken by Zellij) |
   151→| `Tab` | Multi-select: toggle mark on current card |
   152→| `q` / `Ctrl+C` | Quit |
   153→
   154→**Shift+H/L card movement**: calls `fs::rename` directly to move card directory
   155→between state dirs (pending ↔ running not allowed from TUI — only done/failed
   156→↔ pending are safe manual moves). Fires a `Cards` event to refresh immediately.
   157→
   158→### Detail overlay (lazygit pattern)
   159→
   160→Press `d` on selected card → detail panel overlaid on right 50% of body:
   161→
   162→```
   163→╭─ my-feature ─────────────────────╮
   164→│ claude · 2m 14s   ████████░░ 67% │
   165→│                                   │
   166→│ Phase 1  Crash Safety  ●●●●●  5/5 │
   167→│ Phase 2  Network       ●○○○   1/4 │
   168→│   ◉ Write result.md  in_progress  │
   169→│   ○ Run make check   pending      │
   170→│                                   │
   171→│ [F3]logs [p]pause [r]retry [Esc]  │
   172→╰───────────────────────────────────╯
   173→```
   174→
   175→Uses ratatui `Clear` widget on a centered `Rect` + bordered `Block`. Renders
   176→`CardView` + AC plan progress (spec 027) phase/subtask tree. Scrollable with
   177→`j/k`.
   178→
   179→### Action popup (lazygit pattern)
   180→
   181→Press `↵` on selected card:
   182→
   183→```
   184→╭─ Actions: my-feature ──────────────╮
   185→│ [F3] View logs                     │
   186→│ [z]  Open Zellij pane              │
   187→│ [p]  Pause adapter                 │
   188→│ [r]  Retry                         │
   189→│ [k]  Kill (SIGTERM)                │
   190→│ [i]  Inspect AC plan               │
   191→│ [Esc] Cancel                       │
   192→╰────────────────────────────────────╯
   193→```
   194→
   195→Available actions filtered by card state (can't pause a done card, can't retry
   196→a running card).
   197→
   198→### Log tail overlay
   199→
   200→Full-height overlay replacing the body. Triggered by `F3` or `L`:
   201→
   202→```
   203→╔═ logs: my-feature ════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
   204→║ > subtask-1-5: bop recover done                                   ║
   205→║ > Running cargo test -p bop-core                                  ║
   206→║ > test result: ok. 447 passed; 0 failed                           ║
   207→╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
   208→║ [↑↓]scroll [f]follow [c]clear [Esc]close                         ║
   209→╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
   210→```
   211→
   212→**Newline-gated streaming** (codex-rs pattern):
   213→- Open `logs/stdout` and `logs/stderr` of selected card with `O_NONBLOCK`
   214→- Read bytes into a line buffer; only emit complete lines (ending in `\n`)
   215→- Never render a partial line — prevents flickering mid-ANSI-sequence
   216→- On card selection change: close old handles, open new ones, seek to EOF
   217→- Last 200 lines in `VecDeque<String>`. `f` toggles follow-mode (auto-scroll).
   218→
   219→### Filter mode (k9s pattern)
   220→
   221→`/` activates filter:
   222→- Footer replaced with: `Filter: my-feat█  [Esc]clear  [↵]confirm`

entries.content:
All planning artifacts are valid and complete. Here's a summary of what was created:

## Planning Session Complete — Spec 029 (bop ui TUI)

### Files Created
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `context.json` | Codebase patterns, files to modify/create/reference |
| `implementation_plan.json` | 7 phases, 20 subtasks, verification strategy |
| `init.sh` | Environment setup script (executable) |
| `build-progress.txt` | Progress tracking document |

### Plan Overview

**7 Phases, 20 Subtasks** — feature workflow, sequential (1 worker recommended):

1. **TUI Foundation & Event Loop** (4 subtasks) — Dependencies, module structure, AppEvent/App/Mode, TerminalGuard, event loop with crossterm+notify+timer
2. **Kanban Column Layout & Navigation** (2 subtasks) — KanbanWidget with horizontal columns, collapse logic, WIP limits, h/l/j/k navigation
3. **Header Bar & Context-Sensitive Footer** (2 subtasks) — Clock, provider meters, sparkline, demoscene ticker, mode-aware footer, F-key bar
4. **Overlays** (3 subtasks) — Detail overlay (d), action popup (↵), log tail with newline-gated streaming (F3)
5. **Filter Mode & New Card** (2 subtasks) — Nucleo fuzzy filter (/), inline card creation (n)
6. **Card Movement, Multi-Select, Subshell & Resize** (4 subtasks) — Shift+H/L, Tab multi-select, ! subshell, resize handling
7. **Snapshot Tests & Polish** (3 subtasks) — insta tests, make check, output/result.md

### Key Design Decisions
- **13 new source files** in `crates/bop-cli/src/ui/` module tree
- **2 files modified**: `Cargo.toml` (deps) and `main.rs` (subcommand)
- **3 new deps**: ratatui 0.29, crossterm 0.28, nucleo 0.5 + insta (dev)
- **Reuses** existing `CardView`, `from_meta()`, notify watcher pattern, `ProvidersFile` for meters
- **Risk level**: high — major new feature (~2000 LoC, new framework)
I'll implement subtask-1-1: adding TUI dependencies and wiring up the `Ui` subcommand. Let me start by reading the relevant files.

1→# bop ui — full interactive TUI (kanban-first)
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` (spec 025) does in-place ANSI redraw — no alternate
     6→screen. `bop ui` is the explicit opt-in full TUI: alternate screen, **kanban
     7→columns as primary layout**, keyboard navigation, live log tail, fuzzy filter,
     8→action menu. Think k9s for bop cards, with kanban-tui's column-first UX.
     9→
    10→**Prior art synthesized:**
    11→- **ratatui** (codex-rs, gitui, television): double-buffer diff rendering
    12→  built-in — full frame every tick, only changed cells emitted. Do not
    13→  implement a separate sprite-map diff.
    14→- **codex-rs AppEvent pattern**: crossterm + FSEvents notify + timer ticks
    15→  all become one `AppEvent` enum, processed by a single async event loop.
    16→- **codex-rs newline-gated streaming**: buffer log bytes, emit only on `\n`
    17→  to prevent partial ANSI sequence flicker in the live log tail.
    18→- **television / nucleo**: blazing-fast fuzzy filter for `/` mode.
    19→- **lazygit**: action popup via ratatui `Clear` + centered overlay; context-
    20→  sensitive footer keybindings per mode.
    21→- **htop**: provider meter bars in header; saturation coloring.
    22→- **btop**: sparkline `▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█` for throughput history.
    23→- **k9s**: three-zone law (header / body / footer); breadcrumb; `/` filter.
    24→- **kanban-tui / TUI-Kanban**: horizontal columns as primary view; `h/l`
    25→  between columns, `j/k` within; `Shift+H/L` move card to adjacent state;
    26→  WIP limit indicator on column headers.
    27→- **mc (Midnight Commander)**: `Ctrl+O` drops to subshell in card worktree,
    28→  returning to TUI on exit; F-key secondary legend in footer.
    29→- **yazi**: async task priority — render current column first, then prefetch
    30→  neighbours. Multi-select `Tab` accumulates marked cards.
    31→
    32→## Dependencies
    33→
    34→```toml
    35→[dependencies]
    36→ratatui   = "0.29"          # MIT — double-buffer diff, widget system
    37→crossterm = "0.28"          # MIT — alternate screen, events, mouse
    38→nucleo    = "0.5"           # MIT — helix's fuzzy matcher, <1ms on 10k items
    39→```
    40→
    41→## Layout
    42→
    43→```
    44→╔═ bop · 14:23:07 · claude ████░░ ok · codex ░░░░░░ 4m · ▁▂▃▅▇ 8/hr ══════╗
    45→╠═ · PENDING (3) ════╦═ ⚙ RUNNING (2/4) ═════╦═ ✓ DONE (8) ╦═ ✗ FAILED (1) ╣
    46→║  · docs-update     ║▶ my-feature  claude 2m ║ ✓ perf-impr ║ ✗ broken-card ║
    47→║  · refactor-api    ║  ████████░░ 67%  Ph 2  ║ ✓ network   ║               ║
    48→║  · add-tests       ║  bugfix-auth codex  43s║ ✓ cleanup   ║               ║
    49→║                    ║  ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph 1  ║             ║               ║
    50→║                    ║                        ║             ║               ║
    51→╠════════════════════╩════════════════════════╩═════════════╩═══════════════╣
    52→║ [h/l]col [j/k]card [↵]actions [Shift+H/L]move [/]filter [n]new [q]quit  ║
    53→╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
    54→```
    55→
    56→Three zones:
    57→- **Header** (2 rows): live clock + provider meter bars + sparkline
    58→- **Body** (terminal height - 4): horizontal kanban columns
    59→- **Footer** (1 row): context-sensitive keybindings
    60→
    61→## Implementation
    62→
    63→### Entry point
    64→
    65→`crates/bop-cli/src/ui.rs` — `pub async fn run_ui(cards_dir: PathBuf) -> anyhow::Result<()>`
    66→
    67→Called via `bop ui` subcommand. Enters alternate screen, installs raw mode,
    68→exits cleanly on `q` or Ctrl-C. RAII cleanup via a `TerminalGuard` struct that
    69→calls `crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode` + `LeaveAlternateScreen` on drop.
    70→
    71→### AppEvent
    72→
    73→```rust
    74→enum AppEvent {
    75→    Key(KeyEvent),
    76→    Resize(u16, u16),
    77→    Tick,                          // 250ms timer
    78→    Cards(Vec<CardView>),          // notify watcher sent new card list
    79→    LogLine(String),               // new line from log tail reader
    80→}
    81→```
    82→
    83→Background tasks send to `tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<AppEvent>()`.
    84→UI loop: `tokio::select!` on the channel + crossterm event reader. Never block
    85→the render thread.
    86→
    87→### App state
    88→
    89→```rust
    90→struct App {
    91→    columns: Vec<KanbanColumn>,    // ordered: pending, running, done, failed, merged
    92→    col_focus: usize,              // index into columns
    93→    filter: Option<String>,        // active nucleo query
    94→    mode: Mode,
    95→    log_buf: VecDeque<String>,     // last 200 lines from selected card's logs
    96→    throughput: VecDeque<u8>,      // 8 samples for sparkline
    97→}
    98→
    99→struct KanbanColumn {
   100→    state: CardState,              // pending | running | done | failed | merged

100→    state: CardState,              // pending | running | done | failed | merged
   101→    cards: Vec<CardView>,
   102→    list_state: ListState,
   103→    wip_limit: Option<usize>,      // from providers.json max_concurrent for running
   104→    collapsed: bool,               // true when card count == 0
   105→}
   106→
   107→enum Mode {
   108→    Normal,
   109→    Filter,       // / active
   110→    ActionPopup,  // ↵ menu open
   111→    Detail,       // card detail overlay
   112→    LogTail,      // full-height log tail overlay
   113→    NewCard,      // n inline creation prompt
   114→    Subshell,     // Ctrl+O — TUI suspended, shell active
   115→}
   116→```
   117→
   118→### Column layout
   119→
   120→`Layout::horizontal` divides body width equally among non-collapsed columns.
   121→Collapsed columns (0 cards) render as a 3-char narrow divider showing only the
   122→state glyph (`·`, `⚙`, `✓`, `✗`, `~`). Collapsed state toggled automatically
   123→as card counts change.
   124→
   125→Each column is a ratatui `List` of card rows inside a `Block` with title:
   126→- Normal: `╔═ · PENDING (3) ════╗` (dim border)
   127→- Focused: amber (`Color::Yellow`) border
   128→- Running column with WIP limit: `⚙ RUNNING (2/4)` — turns amber at ≥75%,
   129→  red at 100% (column header + border, atop saturation coloring)
   130→
   131→Card row in column (two lines for running cards, one for others):
   132→```
   133→▶ my-feature    claude    2m 14s
   134→  ████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑
   135→```
   136→Running cards show progress; pending/done/failed show one line.
   137→
   138→### Navigation
   139→
   140→| Key | Action |
   141→|---|---|
   142→| `h` / `l` | Move focus to previous / next column |
   143→| `j` / `k` | Select card up / down within column |
   144→| `H` / `L` (Shift) | Move selected card to adjacent state (left/right) |
   145→| `↵` | Open action popup |
   146→| `d` | Open detail overlay for selected card |
   147→| `F3` / `L` | Open log tail overlay |
   148→| `/` | Activate filter mode |
   149→| `n` | New card inline prompt |
   150→| `!` | Subshell in card worktree (vim `:!` convention; `Ctrl+O` is taken by Zellij) |
   151→| `Tab` | Multi-select: toggle mark on current card |
   152→| `q` / `Ctrl+C` | Quit |
   153→
   154→**Shift+H/L card movement**: calls `fs::rename` directly to move card directory
   155→between state dirs (pending ↔ running not allowed from TUI — only done/failed
   156→↔ pending are safe manual moves). Fires a `Cards` event to refresh immediately.
   157→
   158→### Detail overlay (lazygit pattern)
   159→

Subtask 1-2 is complete. Here's what was implemented:

**`crates/bop-cli/src/ui/app.rs`** — Core TUI data model:

- **`AppEvent` enum** — `Key(KeyEvent)`, `Resize(u16, u16)`, `Tick`, `Cards(Vec<KanbanColumn>)`, `LogLine(String)` — unified event stream for the async TUI loop
- **`Mode` enum** — 7 variants: `Normal`, `Filter`, `ActionPopup`, `Detail`, `LogTail`, `NewCard`, `Subshell` — determines active keybindings and overlays
- **`KanbanColumn` struct** — `state`, `cards: Vec<CardView>`, `list_state: ListState`, `wip_limit: Option<usize>`, `collapsed: bool` — with `is_at_wip_limit()` and `wip_saturation()` helpers
- **`App` struct** — `columns`, `col_focus`, `filter`, `mode`, `log_buf: VecDeque<String>` (200 cap), `throughput: VecDeque<u8>` (8 samples), `cards_root`
- **`App::new()`** — reads cards from filesystem using the `collect_card_views` pattern from `list.rs`, reads WIP limit from `bop-core` config's `max_concurrent` field
- **14 unit tests** all passing, covering creation, card loading, WIP limits, capacity bounds, team directory scanning
I'll implement the event loop and terminal guard for the TUI. Let me start by studying the pattern files and understanding the current codebase.

1→# bop ui — full interactive TUI (kanban-first)
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` (spec 025) does in-place ANSI redraw — no alternate
     6→screen. `bop ui` is the explicit opt-in full TUI: alternate screen, **kanban
     7→columns as primary layout**, keyboard navigation, live log tail, fuzzy filter,
     8→action menu. Think k9s for bop cards, with kanban-tui's column-first UX.
     9→
    10→**Prior art synthesized:**
    11→- **ratatui** (codex-rs, gitui, television): double-buffer diff rendering
    12→  built-in — full frame every tick, only changed cells emitted. Do not
    13→  implement a separate sprite-map diff.
    14→- **codex-rs AppEvent pattern**: crossterm + FSEvents notify + timer ticks
    15→  all become one `AppEvent` enum, processed by a single async event loop.
    16→- **codex-rs newline-gated streaming**: buffer log bytes, emit only on `\n`
    17→  to prevent partial ANSI sequence flicker in the live log tail.
    18→- **television / nucleo**: blazing-fast fuzzy filter for `/` mode.
    19→- **lazygit**: action popup via ratatui `Clear` + centered overlay; context-
    20→  sensitive footer keybindings per mode.
    21→- **htop**: provider meter bars in header; saturation coloring.
    22→- **btop**: sparkline `▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█` for throughput history.
    23→- **k9s**: three-zone law (header / body / footer); breadcrumb; `/` filter.
    24→- **kanban-tui / TUI-Kanban**: horizontal columns as primary view; `h/l`
    25→  between columns, `j/k` within; `Shift+H/L` move card to adjacent state;
    26→  WIP limit indicator on column headers.
    27→- **mc (Midnight Commander)**: `Ctrl+O` drops to subshell in card worktree,
    28→  returning to TUI on exit; F-key secondary legend in footer.
    29→- **yazi**: async task priority — render current column first, then prefetch
    30→  neighbours. Multi-select `Tab` accumulates marked cards.
    31→
    32→## Dependencies
    33→
    34→```toml
    35→[dependencies]
    36→ratatui   = "0.29"          # MIT — double-buffer diff, widget system
    37→crossterm = "0.28"          # MIT — alternate screen, events, mouse
    38→nucleo    = "0.5"           # MIT — helix's fuzzy matcher, <1ms on 10k items
    39→```
    40→
    41→## Layout
    42→
    43→```
    44→╔═ bop · 14:23:07 · claude ████░░ ok · codex ░░░░░░ 4m · ▁▂▃▅▇ 8/hr ══════╗
    45→╠═ · PENDING (3) ════╦═ ⚙ RUNNING (2/4) ═════╦═ ✓ DONE (8) ╦═ ✗ FAILED (1) ╣
    46→║  · docs-update     ║▶ my-feature  claude 2m ║ ✓ perf-impr ║ ✗ broken-card ║
    47→║  · refactor-api    ║  ████████░░ 67%  Ph 2  ║ ✓ network   ║               ║
    48→║  · add-tests       ║  bugfix-auth codex  43s║ ✓ cleanup   ║               ║
    49→║                    ║  ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph 1  ║             ║               ║
    50→║                    ║                        ║             ║               ║
    51→╠════════════════════╩════════════════════════╩═════════════╩═══════════════╣
    52→║ [h/l]col [j/k]card [↵]actions [Shift+H/L]move [/]filter [n]new [q]quit  ║
    53→╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
    54→```
    55→
    56→Three zones:
    57→- **Header** (2 rows): live clock + provider meter bars + sparkline
    58→- **Body** (terminal height - 4): horizontal kanban columns
    59→- **Footer** (1 row): context-sensitive keybindings
    60→
    61→## Implementation
    62→
    63→### Entry point
    64→
    65→`crates/bop-cli/src/ui.rs` — `pub async fn run_ui(cards_dir: PathBuf) -> anyhow::Result<()>`
    66→
    67→Called via `bop ui` subcommand. Enters alternate screen, installs raw mode,
    68→exits cleanly on `q` or Ctrl-C. RAII cleanup via a `TerminalGuard` struct that
    69→calls `crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode` + `LeaveAlternateScreen` on drop.
    70→
    71→### AppEvent
    72→
    73→```rust
    74→enum AppEvent {
    75→    Key(KeyEvent),
    76→    Resize(u16, u16),
    77→    Tick,                          // 250ms timer
    78→    Cards(Vec<CardView>),          // notify watcher sent new card list
    79→    LogLine(String),               // new line from log tail reader
    80→}
    81→```
    82→
    83→Background tasks send to `tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<AppEvent>()`.
    84→UI loop: `tokio::select!` on the channel + crossterm event reader. Never block
    85→the render thread.
    86→
    87→### App state
    88→
    89→```rust
    90→struct App {
    91→    columns: Vec<KanbanColumn>,    // ordered: pending, running, done, failed, merged
    92→    col_focus: usize,              // index into columns
    93→    filter: Option<String>,        // active nucleo query
    94→    mode: Mode,
    95→    log_buf: VecDeque<String>,     // last 200 lines from selected card's logs
    96→    throughput: VecDeque<u8>,      // 8 samples for sparkline
    97→}
    98→
    99→struct KanbanColumn {
   100→    state: CardState,              // pending | running | done | failed | merged
   101→    cards: Vec<CardView>,
   102→    list_state: ListState,
   103→    wip_limit: Option<usize>,      // from providers.json max_concurrent for running
   104→    collapsed: bool,               // true when card count == 0
   105→}
   106→
   107→enum Mode {
   108→    Normal,
   109→    Filter,       // / active
   110→    ActionPopup,  // ↵ menu open
   111→    Detail,       // card detail overlay
   112→    LogTail,      // full-height log tail overlay
   113→    NewCard,      // n inline creation prompt
   114→    Subshell,     // Ctrl+O — TUI suspended, shell active
   115→}
   116→```
   117→
   118→### Column layout
   119→
   120→`Layout::horizontal` divides body width equally among non-collapsed columns.
   121→Collapsed columns (0 cards) render as a 3-char narrow divider showing only the
   122→state glyph (`·`, `⚙`, `✓`, `✗`, `~`). Collapsed state toggled automatically
   123→as card counts change.
   124→
   125→Each column is a ratatui `List` of card rows inside a `Block` with title:
   126→- Normal: `╔═ · PENDING (3) ════╗` (dim border)
   127→- Focused: amber (`Color::Yellow`) border
   128→- Running column with WIP limit: `⚙ RUNNING (2/4)` — turns amber at ≥75%,
   129→  red at 100% (column header + border, atop saturation coloring)
   130→
   131→Card row in column (two lines for running cards, one for others):
   132→```
   133→▶ my-feature    claude    2m 14s
   134→  ████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑
   135→```
   136→Running cards show progress; pending/done/failed show one line.
   137→
   138→### Navigation
   139→
   140→| Key | Action |
   141→|---|---|
   142→| `h` / `l` | Move focus to previous / next column |
   143→| `j` / `k` | Select card up / down within column |
   144→| `H` / `L` (Shift) | Move selected card to adjacent state (left/right) |
   145→| `↵` | Open action popup |
   146→| `d` | Open detail overlay for selected card |
   147→| `F3` / `L` | Open log tail overlay |
   148→| `/` | Activate filter mode |
   149→| `n` | New card inline prompt |
   150→| `!` | Subshell in card worktree (vim `:!` convention; `Ctrl+O` is taken by Zellij) |
   151→| `Tab` | Multi-select: toggle mark on current card |
   152→| `q` / `Ctrl+C` | Quit |
   153→
   154→**Shift+H/L card movement**: calls `fs::rename` directly to move card directory
   155→between state dirs (pending ↔ running not allowed from TUI — only done/failed
   156→↔ pending are safe manual moves). Fires a `Cards` event to refresh immediately.
   157→
   158→### Detail overlay (lazygit pattern)
   159→
   160→Press `d` on selected card → detail panel overlaid on right 50% of body:
   161→
   162→```
   163→╭─ my-feature ─────────────────────╮
   164→│ claude · 2m 14s   ████████░░ 67% │
   165→│                                   │
   166→│ Phase 1  Crash Safety  ●●●●●  5/5 │
   167→│ Phase 2  Network       ●○○○   1/4 │
   168→│   ◉ Write result.md  in_progress  │
   169→│   ○ Run make check   pending      │
   170→│                                   │
   171→│ [F3]logs [p]pause [r]retry [Esc]  │
   172→╰───────────────────────────────────╯
   173→```
   174→
   175→Uses ratatui `Clear` widget on a centered `Rect` + bordered `Block`. Renders
   176→`CardView` + AC plan progress (spec 027) phase/subtask tree. Scrollable with
   177→`j/k`.
   178→
   179→### Action popup (lazygit pattern)
   180→
   181→Press `↵` on selected card:
   182→
   183→```
   184→╭─ Actions: my-feature ──────────────╮
   185→│ [F3] View logs                     │
   186→│ [z]  Open Zellij pane              │
   187→│ [p]  Pause adapter                 │
   188→│ [r]  Retry                         │
   189→│ [k]  Kill (SIGTERM)                │
   190→│ [i]  Inspect AC plan               │
   191→│ [Esc] Cancel                       │
   192→╰────────────────────────────────────╯
   193→```
   194→
   195→Available actions filtered by card state (can't pause a done card, can't retry
   196→a running card).
   197→
   198→### Log tail overlay
   199→
   200→Full-height overlay replacing the body. Triggered by `F3` or `L`:
   201→
   202→```
   203→╔═ logs: my-feature ════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
   204→║ > subtask-1-5: bop recover done                                   ║
   205→║ > Running cargo test -p bop-core                                  ║
   206→║ > test result: ok. 447 passed; 0 failed                           ║
   207→╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
   208→║ [↑↓]scroll [f]follow [c]clear [Esc]close                         ║
   209→╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
   210→```
   211→
   212→**Newline-gated streaming** (codex-rs pattern):
   213→- Open `logs/stdout` and `logs/stderr` of selected card with `O_NONBLOCK`
   214→- Read bytes into a line buffer; only emit complete lines (ending in `\n`)
   215→- Never render a partial line — prevents flickering mid-ANSI-sequence
   216→- On card selection change: close old handles, open new ones, seek to EOF
   217→- Last 200 lines in `VecDeque<String>`. `f` toggles follow-mode (auto-scroll).
   218→
   219→### Filter mode (k9s pattern)
   220→
   221→`/` activates filter:
   222→- Footer replaced with: `Filter: my-feat█  [Esc]clear  [↵]confirm`
